Sample Playwright Test


// Sample Playwright test generated by AutomationScriptCreator
const { test, expect } = require('@playwright/test');

test('1. smoke_test_critical_user_journey', async ({ page }) => {
  // Test Case: Smoke Test - Critical User Journey
  // ID: SMOKE_abc123
  // Priority: High
  // Description: Tests the most important user interactions on the page

  // Precondition: User navigates to https://www.bbc.com
  await page.goto('https://www.bbc.com');
  await page.waitForLoadState('domcontentloaded');
  await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/.*/); // Verify page loaded

  // Test Steps
  // Step 1: Interact with the Navigation: Home News Sport Business Innovation Health Culture
  await page.click('nav');
  
  // Step 2: Interact with the Button: Home
  await page.click('button');
  
  // Step 3: Interact with the Button: News
  await page.click('button');
  
  // Step 4: Interact with the Button: Sport
  await page.click('button');
  
  // Step 5: Interact with the Button: Business
  await page.click('button');

  // Expected Results
  await expect(page).toHaveTitle(/.*/); // Page loads successfully
  // All critical elements are visible and interactive
  // No JavaScript errors in console
  // Page responds within 3 seconds
  // User can complete basic tasks without errors
});

To run this test:

  1. Save as bbc-test.spec.js
  2. Install Playwright: npm init playwright@latest
  3. Run: npx playwright test bbc-test.spec.js
  4. View report: npx playwright show-report
